heading: Authorization of appropriations for cooperative research projects
label: 2204–5 Authorization of appropriations for cooperative research projects
text: There is authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of sections 2204–1 to 2204–5 of this title.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification as this section, and to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, by , , .section 450g of this titlesection 516e of Title 5Pub.
